name: edinburgh
author: Frank van Viegen
description: Very fast object persistence for TypeScript, supporting optimistic transactions, lazy loading and indexes.

scripts.build: rm -rf build && tsc && bun run build:docs
scripts.test: npm run test:bun && npm run test:node
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run test && npm run build:docs
scripts.build:docs: rm -rf skill ; mkdir skill ; cat skill-header.md README.md > skill/SKILL.md && readme-tsdoc --split --file skill/SKILL.md && readme-tsdoc --repo-url https://github.com/vanviegen/edinburgh
